original_image_tags: A page with a large black redaction block covering the top three-quarters. Overlaid on the black block in large red text is the marking "1.4(a)". Below the block, a portion of a typed email or memo is visible.

elements.description: A large red stamp or redaction mark containing the text '1.4(a)' and a smaller red mark or redaction block containing the text '(b) (6)'.

judge.reason: Description A describes a black redaction block with red text '1.4(a)' above typed text, while Description B describes a red stamp or redaction mark containing '1.4(a)' and a separate red mark containing '(b) (6)', which are contradictory claims about the same visual elements.
